evidence_summary: /opusworkflow skill exists and documents the definitive Opus/MiniMax workflow
setup.sh defaults to opusworkflow while preserving --mode overrides
the wrapper prepares workflow-mode opusminimax artifacts with outer_route, inner_contract, outcome_policy, provider_ceiling=1, and effective_concurrency=1
agentfactory and hiveworkflow inner contracts inherit the OpusWorkflow provider split by default
docs and release/eval surfaces discover the route
